items.name: animated-counter
items.title: Animated Counter
items.description: Animates a numeric value from start to end using requestAnimationFrame with easing.

items.name: animated-number
items.title: Animated Number
items.description: A number that animates smoothly to a new value using spring physics.

items.name: animated-stack
items.title: Animated Stack
items.description: An interactive stack of cards that expand and animate on hover with smooth spring animations.

items.name: arrow-tooltip
items.title: Arrow Tooltip
items.description: A styled tooltip with an arrow indicator, built on Radix UI.

items.name: chat-input
items.title: Chat Input
items.description: A minimalist chat input with animated message bubbles and auto bot replies.

items.name: blur-fade
items.title: Blur Fade
items.description: Animates children with a blur and fade effect on scroll into view.

items.name: feedback
items.title: Feedback
items.description: A feedback form with loading animation and click-outside detection.

items.name: glow-card
items.title: Glow Card
items.description: A card with a radial gradient glow effect that follows the mouse position.

items.name: gradient-text
items.title: Gradient Text
items.description: Text with a linear gradient background that can animate using CSS.

items.name: hover-card
items.title: Hover Card
items.description: A card that reveals its description on hover with a smooth slide-up animation. Keyboard accessible.

items.name: magnetic-button
items.title: Magnetic Button
items.description: A button that follows the cursor position with spring physics animation.

items.name: marquee
items.title: Marquee
items.description: Scrolling marquee text with optional reverse direction and hover pause.

items.name: popover-morph
items.title: Popover Morph
items.description: A popover component with morphing animations and click-outside detection.

items.name: progressive-blur
items.title: Progressive Blur
items.description: A gradient overlay with backdrop blur that fades content at the edges of a scrollable container.

items.name: ripple-button
items.title: Ripple Button
items.description: A button with Material Design ripple effect on click.

items.name: shimmer-text
items.title: Shimmer Text
items.description: Text with an animated shimmer effect using a gradient background.

items.name: shimmering-text
items.title: Shimmering Text
items.description: A text component with beautiful shimmer animation effects that glide across the text.

items.name: text-reveal
items.title: Text Reveal
items.description: Reveals text word-by-word with an upward slide animation when scrolled into view.

items.name: typewriter
items.title: Typewriter
items.description: Types out text character-by-character with customizable speed.

items.name: typing-text
items.title: Typing Text
items.description: A typing text animation. Highly customizable and easy to use.
